tool_input.old_string: <Modal title="预约时间" open={scheduleModalOpen} onOk={handleSchedule} onCancel={() => <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(false)}
tool_input.new_string:
<<HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>
        customerId={detailCustomer?.id ?? null}
        customerCode={detailCustomer?.customerCode}
        open={!!detailCustomer}
        onClose={() => setDetailCustomer(null)} />
      <Modal title="预约时间" open={scheduleModalOpen} onOk={handleSchedule} onCancel={() => <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(false)}

tool_response.oldString: <Modal title="预约时间" open={scheduleModalOpen} onOk={handleSchedule} onCancel={() => <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(false)}
tool_response.newString:
<<HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>
        customerId={detailCustomer?.id ?? null}
        customerCode={detailCustomer?.customerCode}
        open={!!detailCustomer}
        onClose={() => setDetailCustomer(null)} />
      <Modal title="预约时间" open={scheduleModalOpen} onOk={handleSchedule} onCancel={() => <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(false)}

lines: <CreateOrderModal open={createOrderOpen} onClose={() => { setCreateOrderOpen(false); <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(null); }} onCreated={() => { fetchCustomers(); <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(null); }} userId={user?.id} customerPreFill={startServicePreFill} />
<Modal title="预约时间" open={scheduleModalOpen} onOk={handleSchedule} onCancel={() => <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>(false)}
okText="确认预约" cancelText="取消" destroyOnClose>
